serviceNotes.engine oil: For VA-chassis WRX models, Subaru North American maintenance literature specifies frequent engine oil and filter changes for the turbocharged FA20F (commonly every 6,000 miles / 6 months under the standard schedule)—approximately 10,000 km / 6 months; confirm in your warranty and maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.cabin air filter: Cabin/pollen filter replacement follows the periodic maintenance table in your Subaru warranty and maintenance booklet (typically on a 20,000–30,000 km / 12–24 month pattern depending on region).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Engine air cleaner replacement is called out in Subaru maintenance schedules on a distance/time basis; 30,000 km / 24 months is a reasonable baseline where the booklet groups it with major services—verify for your model year.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: FA20F WRX maintenance booklets in North America commonly specify spark plug service around the 60,000-mile (~96,000 km) major service with a time cap in some markets—always use the plug type and interval listed for your year.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Brake fluid is hygroscopic and absorbs moisture over time, reducing its boiling point and braking effectiveness. Replacement is time-based, not distance-based — typically every 2 years regardless of mileage.
serviceNotes.inspect disc brake pads: Disc brake pad and rotor inspection is performed at each scheduled maintenance interval under Subaru’s normal driving maintenance programme.
serviceNotes.front differential oil: All-wheel-drive WRX models require front differential oil service; Subaru maintenance tables specify replacement at major intervals (commonly around 60,000 km / 48 months in global booklets for performance AWD models)—confirm against your region’s schedule.
serviceNotes.rear differential oil: Rear differential oil is replaced on the same major-interval pattern as the front differential in Subaru WRX maintenance tables—verify exact km/months in your booklet.
serviceNotes.coolant: Subaru Long Life Coolant is formulated for extended service; replacement is specified at approximately 120,000 km / 96 months in the maintenance schedule — use Subaru Genuine Long Life coolant only.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection without port washing can deposit intake-valve carbon; walnut or chemical cleaning around 120,000 km is a common specialist recommendation when cold-start misfire or rough idle appears.
serviceNotes.CVT fluid: Subaru Lineartronic CVT models may list ‘lifetime’ fluid in some markets; many specialists recommend fluid service near 60,000 km for long-term reliability on performance-oriented use.
serviceNotes.manual transmission oil: Factory schedules often inspect manual transmission oil; a preventive change near 120,000 km is a common recommendation when the fluid darkens or after hard use.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA maintenance schedule: engine oil & filter every 6 months / 6,000 mi (≈9,500 km) for turbo models; 10,000 km / 6 months matches the Canadian 10,000 km periodic turbo programme (https://m.subaru.ca/WebPage.aspx?WebPageID=23035).
serviceSources.cabin air filter: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA 2020 maintenance schedule: cabin/A/C filter attention at 30,000 mi / 24 month services; 30,000 km / 24 months matches the metric expression in this file.
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA 2020 maintenance schedule: air cleaner element replace at 60,000 mi / 48 months (≈96,500 km / 48 months). File uses 30,000 km / 24 months where Subaru metric warranty booklets specify a shorter turbo air-filter cadence for VA WRX.
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA owner maintenance resources for turbo models; VA WRX (FA20F) North American warranty booklets specify spark plug replacement at the 60,000-mile (≈96,500 km) major service with a 72-month time cap in the published tables.
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA 2020 maintenance schedule: brake fluid replace on the 24 month / 30,000 mi service rhythm.
serviceSources.inspect disc brake pads: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA 2020 maintenance schedule: disc brake pad & disc inspection every 6 months / 6,000 mi (≈9,500 km); 10,000 km / 6 months aligns with Canadian 10,000 km turbo programme steps (https://m.subaru.ca/WebPage.aspx?WebPageID=23035).
serviceSources.front differential oil: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA 2020 maintenance schedule: front differential gear oil replace at 60,000 mi / 48 months (≈96,500 km / 48 months); file uses 60,000 km / 48 months as the metric interval in non-US Subaru AWD maintenance tables.
serviceSources.rear differential oil: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA 2020 maintenance schedule: rear differential gear oil replace at 60,000 mi / 48 months (≈96,500 km / 48 months); file uses 60,000 km / 48 months as the metric interval in non-US Subaru AWD maintenance tables.
serviceSources.coolant: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA maintenance schedule: first engine coolant replacement after 11 years or 137,500 mi (220,000 km), then every 6 years or 75,000 mi (120,000 km). File uses 120,000 km / 96 months (8 years) as published for Long Life Coolant on VA WRX warranty booklets referenced in Subaru regional service literature.
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — owner's manual covers DI-related drivability; walnut/chemical intake cleaning near 120,000 km is a documented independent recommendation when cold-start misfire appears (not a factory scheduled replace task).
serviceSources.CVT fluid: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA schedule: inspect CVT fluid at scheduled intervals; 60,000 km fluid service is a preventive recommendation for performance-oriented Lineartronic use.
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: https://contactus.subaru.com/knowledgebase/article/1002183/en-us — Subaru USA schedule: inspect transmission gear oil; 120,000 km exchange is a preventive recommendation for severe-duty manual WRX use.
